final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand color palette and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: needs a refined, editorial brand-standards aesthetic — exact layout and typographic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand specification sheet layout showing primary colors, secondary/accent colors, and typography samples in clearly labeled sections
Subject: must include:
  Brand identity: 染秋 (RAN QIU) — autumn fragrance brand
  Primary color palette: inspired by 桂花 / 柿子 / 枫叶 / 乌龙茶 — warm amber, persimmon orange, maple red, deep oolong brown
  Secondary/accent palette: inspired by 肉桂 / 檀香 / 琥珀 — muted spice, sandalwood beige, amber gold
  Typography specimens: display typeface + body typeface, shown in both Chinese and Latin characters
  Core series names for reference tone: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, minimal brand-sheet backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic autumn atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: must be anchored in autumn-harvest warmth — deep persimmon, amber, maple, oolong brown, sandalwood, with muted earthy accents — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a subtle reference to traditional Chinese 染 (dyeing) craft texture — exact grain and surface weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (primary brand name, large), "RAN QIU" (Latin transliteration, secondary), "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色" (series names, specimen use), color swatch labels and typography labels as needed for a spec sheet
Constraints: must preserve the Eastern philosophical and 染 craft identity throughout; layout must clearly distinguish primary colors, secondary colors, and typography zones
Avoid: overly Western minimalism that erases the Eastern identity; neon or cold tones; generic sans-serif-only layouts with no cultural resonance
